theme: depot parcel loading with a silent size-mix surge
title: Depot Loading Under a Silent Surge
strategies: next-fit-commit: keep filling the current truck online, never revisit, never repack (reproduces the evaluator's weak reference)

online best-fit: load each arriving parcel into whichever open truck leaves the least slack, opening a new truck only when nothing fits (textbook, but tight best-fit leaves no slack for a later size-mix shift)

probe + reserve-headroom + timed repack: track the running fraction of 'large' parcels in the stream so far; while it stays low, cap how full a truck may get (hold real slack back); the moment the running fraction crosses a threshold (a surge is starting), spend the repack budget immediately to merge near-full trucks into fewer fuller ones before absorbing the surge; spend any leftover budget on a final cleanup consolidation
